source_pdf: Minutes of the meeting of CWWG as on 06.07.2026.pdf
original_text: Approximately  69%  of  the  wells  have  groundwater  levels  within  10  metres  below  ground  level, whereas  only  about  4%  have  groundwater  levels  deeper  than  40  metres, indicating  good groundwater availability across most regions.

source_pdf: Minutes of the meeting of CWWG as on 06.07.2026.pdf
original_text: Groundwater  drought  is  predominantly  mild  and  confined  to  limited  areas. Among  the  affected wells,  7.2%  are  classified  as  experiencing  mild  drought,  2.2%  moderate  drought,  0.9%  severe drought, and 1.9% extreme drought.

source_pdf: Minutes of the meeting of CWWG as on 06.07.2026.pdf
original_text: According to the Pre-Monsoon 2026 Groundwater Drought Index, groundwater conditions across the country are predominantly normal, with groundwater stress restricted to limited areas in a few states.
